tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 10: function call as initializer => has side effects, not eligible for move
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 1: single-use safe variable => move
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 2: shared variable used by two segments => reexport
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 3: exported variable used by segment => reexport (MIG-03)
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 4: side-effect declaration used by one segment => reexport (MIG-04)
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 5: safe literals are eligible for move if single-use
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 6: destructuring with shared bindings => reexport (MIG-05)
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 6a: shared destructure all flowing to one segment => move (MIG-05a)
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 6b: shared destructure split across segments => reexport
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 6c: shared destructure with one binding used by root => reexport
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 7: variable not used by any segment => keep
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 8: variable used by root AND a segment => reexport
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration Test 9: arrow function expression => safe, eligible for move
tests/optimizer/variable-migration.test.ts :: analyzeMigration exported variable NOT used by any segment => keep
